title: ELKTON COMMUNITY EDUCATION CENTER - 211info
text: ELKTON COMMUNITY EDUCATION CENTER ELKTON COMMUNITY EDUCATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides cultural and educational services including nature and art experiences as well as classes and events. 15850 Highway 38 Elkton, OR 97436 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office and Gift Shop: Varies by season Library: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm and second Saturday of the month 10am-2pm Email (541) 584-2692 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 584-2692 Alternate (541) 389-2359 Elkton Senior Group Margaret Wardrope [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None. Donations are accepted. Groups arranging for tours may be asked to donate $2 per person, with a minimum of $30. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Elkton SITE HOURS: Open from sun up to sun down. TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on State Highway 38, 1 mile west of Highway 138 and Highway 38 junction. Services: Nature Centers/Walks Neighborhood Multipurpose Centers Youth Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - YOUTH EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM FOOD - SUMMER SNACK BAG PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
